# Beacon House

> Premium Ivy League admissions consultancy for Indian students (Grades 8-12). Founder-supervised strategy, profile building, and candidacy development for selective universities.

## Results
- 730+ Cumulative Ivy League Admits
- 159+ Top 10 Admits In 2025-26
- 100+ Cumulative Top 5 UK Admits
- $4Mn+ In Scholarships

## What We Do
We help students build the direction, evidence and positioning that selective universities reward. We build the applicant before we build the application.

## Process
1. Direction — Identify the academic, personal and strategic direction
2. Positioning — Shape how choices, strengths and interests come together
3. Evidence — Build research, projects, writing, competitions, portfolios
4. Application — Bring the built profile into one coherent narrative

## Why Beacon House Is Different
- Founders + Former Admissions Officers make key decisions (not junior staff)
- Depth built via mentorship by domain experts from top schools
- Global (US/UK/India) research and mentorship access
- Experience across thousands of selective-university outcomes

## Partnership
In partnership with InGenius Prep — 150+ Former Admissions Officers.

## Contact
- Website: https://beaconhouse.in
- Strategic Review: https://admissions.beaconhouse.in/application-form
- Trustpilot Score: 4.6
